contract.goal: Bring projects/2026-05-21-linear-loom/manifest.json in sync with the 8-phase decomposition in PLAN.md so subsequent loom verb calls (phase update, checkin write) can address Phases 2-8 by number. Substrate-housekeeping unit; no design judgment beyond getting phase names right.
acceptance_criteria: Phase names match PLAN.md ### Phase N — <name> headings: 1 'DESIGN.md', 2 'Plugin scaffolding', 3 'Project lifecycle verbs', 4 'Substrate mirroring', 5 'Plan-to-tasks generation', 6 'Manual write-back verbs', 7 'ev-linear plugin', 8 'Dogfood'.
No retroactive bookkeeping: no fake checkins or pr-merged events for Phase 1's prior PRs.
rules_applied: Substrate-only unit: panel auto-derivation falls back to evaluator-contract-fit only (per docs/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md substrate-only fallback).
No `loom phase add` verb today (substrate gap; see memory feedback_loom_phase_and_checkin_gaps) — direct manifest.json edit per documented workaround.
Pattern A (write complete checkin once at unit end) per the same substrate-gap memory: checkin write is append-once-only; contract-only-then-finalize would require a verb that doesn't exist.
disqualifiers: Editing PLAN.md (planning artifact; revisions happen via /loom-revise-plan, not unit work).
Retroactively writing pr-merged events for #30/#31/#32/#33 (forward-only edits per substrate convention).

actions: Read existing manifest.json (single generic 'Phase 1 / not-started' entry only).
Rewrote phases[] array to 8 entries with names from PLAN.md ### Phase N headings, Phase 1 status 'completed', Phases 2-8 status 'not-started'.
Verified via `loom project read linear-loom --pretty` — all 8 phases present in order, names + statuses match acceptance criteria.
No events.jsonl backfill: project-initialized stays as the only event; pr-merged events for #30/#31/#32/#33 deliberately not retroactively emitted (forward-only substrate convention).

changes_since_previous: First unit on the ev-agent.linear-loom.scaffold branch. Branch cut from main at 36ff0e7 (post-#33-merge). Prior branch ev-agent.linear-loom.plan-revise-2 merged via PR #33 at 2026-05-22T16:49:13Z.
notes_for_pr: Substrate-only unit: panel auto-derivation correctly fell back to evaluator-contract-fit only. No domain evaluators applied.

Pattern A used for checkin write (complete checkin at unit end) since Phase 2 didn't exist in the manifest at unit start — the contract-only-then-finalize variant of Pattern B would have errored at the contract-write step.

Substrate-followup candidate: `loom phase add` verb (or `phase update --create-if-missing` affordance) would eliminate the direct-manifest-edit workaround for new-phase-mid-plan situations like this one. Captured per feedback_loom_phase_and_checkin_gaps memory.
